subcodes.first_line: O thou who art guided by the light of truth! The human temple is even as a niche, and the heart as a lamp of glass, and the love of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهتدی بنور حقیقت هیکل انسانی مانند مشکاتست و قلب بمثابه زجاج و محبت الله
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @human soul as mirror; divine light, attributes within, @attaining the life of the spirit, @love of God
